content:
REMOTE_BURNIN_REPORT
AGENT:
NYC Hermes Researcher (`1d473c40-8bbe-47ee-8420-441ec75a9c0e`) on assigned issue [DAS-102](mention://issue/6763b50a-0113-490f-95f7-624b629e27ff).

RUNTIME:
`hermes-nyc1`; pwd `/root/multica_workspaces/5470ee5d-0791-4713-beb4-fd6a187d6523/7a5c394f/workdir`; Linux `6.8.0-71-generic` x86_64. Memory: 3.8Gi total, 1.7Gi available, 31Gi swap with 29Gi free. Disk at `.`: `/dev/vda1` 77G total, 31G available, 60% used.

COMMANDS:
Ran required read/status commands plus bounded runtime checks: `multica issue get`, `multica issue comment list` for [DAS-102](mention://issue/6763b50a-0113-490f-95f7-624b629e27ff)/DAS-94/[DAS-95](mention://issue/f0728723-d7c1-4521-ad5f-821603812a1b), `multica issue status ... in_progress`, `hostname`, `pwd`, `uname -a`, `free -h`, `df -h .`, and a targeted `multica issue list --limit 120 --output json | jq` only to resolve [DAS-94](mention://issue/e18b14c2-084e-4d8a-931d-45f3dee9749b)/DAS-95 IDs. No repo checkout, repo edit, daemon mutation, destructive command, or credential/env inspection.

SOURCES:
[DAS-94](mention://issue/e18b14c2-084e-4d8a-931d-45f3dee9749b) comments only; [DAS-95](mention://issue/f0728723-d7c1-4521-ad5f-821603812a1b) comments only; live local runtime commands above.

CHECK_RESULT:
PASS for bounded Hermes research/synthesis execution: this lane read scoped issue/comment evidence, performed local pressure checks, and can synthesize a compact evidence-backed report after the tmux Hermes session closure. [DAS-95](mention://issue/f0728723-d7c1-4521-ad5f-821603812a1b) already reported remote Hermes smoke PASS. [DAS-94](mention://issue/e18b14c2-084e-4d8a-931d-45f3dee9749b) confirms remote Codex initialization/basic execution recovered after removing unsupported custom args, but repo-backed Codex work remains flagged.

FAILURE_MODE:
No Hermes failure reproduced here. The active flagged risk before heavy remote repo-backed work is repo metadata/checkout: [DAS-94](mention://issue/e18b14c2-084e-4d8a-931d-45f3dee9749b) says remote checkout resolved to laptop-local `file:///Users/0xvox/multica-ultimate-workbench`, inaccessible from `hermes-nyc1`; accepted follow-up is to reconcile workspace repo metadata or use the GitHub project resource as the remote-safe anchor. Prior Codex custom-arg init failure was fixed. Hermes runtime update lag does not appear relevant to this burn-in based on available scoped evidence; the observed risks are configuration/repo-resource issues, not Hermes execution lag.

TOKEN_RISK:
Low/normal. Reads were scoped to the assigned issue plus [DAS-94](mention://issue/e18b14c2-084e-4d8a-931d-45f3dee9749b)/DAS-95 comments; no broad issue history, secrets, env, OAuth, cookies, or raw credentials were printed.

NEXT_ACTION:
Before heavy remote repo-backed work, fix or bypass laptop-local workspace repo metadata by anchoring NYC tasks to `https://github.com/Fearvox/multica-ultimate-workbench`; optionally run a separate read-only GitHub-resource checkout probe after that metadata path is corrected.

VERDICT: PASS
